library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: Mysterious text with alternating lines of Hebrew script (mostly Aramaic, it seems) and Arabic script, many or all of which are glosses on the former. Mentions some random Arabic words, eg. parts of a bird: al-ḥawṣala, al-qānisa. Could be a magical text. Needs examination.
description_he: טקסט ספרותי בArabic, Aramaic, Hebrew. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
